catalog_content:
Item Name: Alyssa’s Vegan Oatmeal Bites ⎸ Gluten Free Cookies, Healthy Snacks from the Bakery ⎸ Dairy Free, Sugar Free, Low Carb, Keto Protein Snacks ⎸ Gluten Free Snacks for Kids ⎸ 8 Cookies per box, 1 Pack
Bullet Point 1: VEGAN OATMEAL BITES (1 Pack) — Oatmeal cookies that will melt in your mouth and come with a pop of flavor with organic cranberries. Enjoy snacking or turn them into a whole meal.
Bullet Point 2: YOU WOULDN’T KNOW IT’S VEGAN if we weren’t shouting about it, because vegan snacks don’t usually taste this good. Vegan cookies that are high in protein and have no added sugar and still taste delicious? HOW COULD WE NOT SHOUT ABOUT IT?
Bullet Point 3: SUGAR FREE SNACKS! All of our cookies are sweetened with chicory root fiber, known to help keep insulin spikes under control so they’re the perfect diabetic snacks for dessert. But also the perfect breakfast food. Eat them whenever you want.
Bullet Point 4: ALL ORGANIC INGREDIENTS that come together to make allergen friendly snacks. All of our products are made in our gluten free certified bakery, plus they’re soy free, non GMO, peanut free snacks.
Bullet Point 5: ON-THE-GO GOODNESS — These protein cookies have high fiber and will fill you up, so bring them with you or pack them in a school lunch. Organic cookies that can be healthy snacks for kids are the perfect way to have your cake and eat it too.
Product Description: Welcome to your new pantry staple. Next to the gluten free bread crumbs, the honey pack, healthy muffins, the other low calorie snacks, these sugar free cookies will stand out as the healthy snack that checks every box. A low carb snack that is as good for you as it is delicious. Low sugar candy never quite lives up to the original version, and usually natural ingredients in healthy treats mean a dry and crumbly texture. But ALYSSA’S SINCE 2010 makes cookies that bring new light to nut free snacks, to healthy snacks for adults. Put the keto chocolate away and enjoy a healthy dessert that will have you coming back for seconds, will have you enjoying it as a healthy breakfast, a healthy lunch, a healthy dinner. Whether you’re interested in brownies or oatmeal cookies, why not make them healthy brownies? We’re not saying that you need to be interested in health to enjoy our gluten free snacks, maybe you just like good food.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium positioning with organic, gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegan certifications. High-protein, sugar-free, and keto-friendly claims justify a higher price point. Small pack size (8 cookies) with high-quality ingredients and special dietary compliance likely targets health-conscious consumers willing to pay more for premium health benefits.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Tiesta Tea - Black Thai Tropical | Loose Leaf | Mango Citrus Black Tea | Premium Blend | Caffeinated | Make Hot or Iced Brews Up to 200 Cups | 16 Ounce Resealable Bulk Pouch
Bullet Point 1: MANGO CITRUS BLACK TEA: Indulge in the luscious symphony of flavors with our Mango Citrus Black Tea. This enticing brew marries the robust character of black tea with the exotic allure of lemongrass and succulent mango. Enjoy it hot or refreshingly iced, and relish the essence of summer with every sip.
Bullet Point 2: PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF TEA BLEND: Elevate your tea ritual with our meticulously crafted premium loose leaf blend. We've carefully sourced the finest natural ingredients, including premium Apple, black tea, pineapple, orange slices, mango and pomegranate, to awaken your senses. As you bid farewell to disposable tea bags, you'll embrace the opulent richness that's visible in the vibrant tea leaves, aromatic in its scent, and truly savored in each cup.
Bullet Point 3: RESEALABLE BULK POUCH FOR TEA LOVERS: Our charming and reusable pouch is the perfect gift for tea enthusiasts. Offering airtight storage, it ensures that your black loose leaf tea remains cozy and fresh for 140-200 cups. Not only a functional addition to your tea collection, but it also sits beautifully on your countertop, a testament to your passion for fine teas.
Bullet Point 4: EFFORTLESS BREWING: Enjoy a hassle-free brewing experience with our black loose leaf tea. Simply scoop 1.5 tsp of this delightful loose leaf tea blend for every 8 oz of hot water at 195 degrees Fahrenheit. Allow it to steep for 3-5 minutes to release the full spectrum of flavors. Then, savor the moment as you remove the tea leaves and indulge in your perfectly steeped cup. It's the ideal way to appreciate the rich and aromatic notes of our premium blend.
Bullet Point 5: SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to complement the vibrant, sunny days of Spring and Summer. These refreshing and aromatic flavors are perfect for sipping on warm afternoons, whether you’re unwinding at home or enjoying time outdoors with friends.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
product_name: Black Thai Tropical Mango Citrus Black Tea
overall_summary: Premium loose-leaf black tea blend with natural ingredients, positioned as a high-quality, aromatic product. The resealable pouch ensures freshness and longevity, justifying a mid-to-high price point. Seasonal flavors and effortless brewing instructions enhance its appeal for tea enthusiasts.
